title: Check If a String Can Break Another String
hints: Since permutations are allowed, the original order of characters is irrelevant; only the multiset of characters matters.
Sorting both strings aligns characters by magnitude, which is the optimal way to check the breaking condition.
After sorting, simply verify if s1[i] >= s2[i] for all i, or if s2[i] >= s1[i] for all i.
